---
title: "migrate_to_qmd.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\migrate_to_qmd.py"
loc: 58
complexity: 11
logic_score: 6.25
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 6.92
overall_score: 3.76
---

## Intent
The `migrate_to_qmd.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on get_checksum, MigrationEngine, get_checksum, migrate_file, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via get_checksum, MigrationEngine, get_checksum, migrate_file, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [hashlib](file://hashlib)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `get_checksum`
- `MigrationEngine`
- `get_checksum`
- `migrate_file`
- `main`
